reasoning: The base rate for any team winning the Super Bowl is 1/32 (~3%), but the 49ers have been strong contenders recently. The community prediction market was at 7% as of Oct 30, 2025, which corresponds to roughly Week 8-10 of the NFL season. This positions the 49ers as a meaningful contender but not the outright favorite. Since I do not have access to search tools to check the specific game outcomes or potential injuries between October 30 and the knowledge cutoff of November 9 (which could move the probability up or down), the most unbiased estimate is to follow the efficient market hypothesis and use the most recent available market price. Therefore, I estimate the probability to be 7%.
